positive: A vibrant and mesmerizing botanical celestial mandala featuring detailed stylized wildflowers interwoven with swirling nebula clouds and crescent moons. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and centered, designed as a repeating pattern or full chest print on apparel. The color palette uses deep indigo, ethereal teal, warm gold accents, soft lavender, and rich emerald green. Style is intricate linocut combined with bioluminescent watercolor aesthetics. High contrast, clean silhouette outlines, highly decorative, symmetrical composition, clean vector art feel, designed for print, flat lay presentation.
negative: blurry, grainy, deformed, artifacts, text, watermarks, low detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, messy, noise, grayscale, photographic, photorealistic
